findings.summary: Service role key was present in local .env and secret scanning was absent.
findings.fix: Removed the local key entry, added gitleaks workflow, verified no service role marker in client scan.
findings.remaining_external_action: Rotate the key in Supabase dashboard and update server-side deployment secret.

findings.fix: Moved to @supabase/ssr browser/server clients with strict cookie settings.
Removed admin-tier signup options and added pending-approval database migration plus approval RPC.

findings.summary: Wildcard CORS was used by the invite-staff edge function.
findings.fix: Restricted CORS to the production origin and added origin rejection.
Added enforced CSP, HSTS, nosniff, frame deny, referrer, permissions, and no-store headers.

findings.summary: patients, appointments, and pharmacy_items had broad select policies.
findings.fix: Added role-scoped policies in a new security migration.
Replaced with React style content and sanitized CSS variable names.
